features: Eliminates Odours at the Source: Unlike typical air fresheners that only mask bad smells with perfumes, Neutradol's gel-based formula works at the molecular level, breaking down and neutralising odours to deliver genuinely clean, fresh air.
90 Days of Continuous Freshness: Long lasting formula works around the clock to keep your space smelling great.

No Plugs, No Fuss: With its simple peel and place design, you can enjoy effortless freshness without batteries, sprays, or power outlets. Just open and place it where odours persist and it starts working instantly.
Gentle and Effective Formula: With over 50 active ingredients, it breaks down even the toughest smells for a truly clean, fresh environment, perfect for pet and everyday household odours.
Discreet & Powerful: Compact design fits in any room, including bathroom, kitchen, or offices, while delivering powerful odour control.
